tier_a.description: Single instance app groups — role detection + blast radius

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (3.2%) and peak CPU (5.9%) below thresholds over 7 days.

key_facts: steady idle role confirmed
P95 CPU 3.2% well below threshold
STOP is the correct action
no relationships — no blast radius concern

A2.description: Steady instance, zombie (stopped > 30 days, near-zero network)

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Zombie: Instance stopped for 38 days with near-zero network activity (42 bytes avg).

key_facts: stopped 38 days
near-zero network activity (42 bytes avg)
zombie — no workload evidence
TERMINATE is correct — LLM must remove the resource block

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Oversized: P95 CPU (7.8%) and peak CPU (17.6%) below capacity thresholds over 14 days.

key_facts: steady oversized
P95 CPU 7.8% and peak 17.6% below capacity
DOWNSIZE to c5.large correct
projected CPU 15.6% on c5.large — safe headroom

A4.description: Bursty instance, peak CPU never exceeded 20% threshold

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Bursty Oversized: Peak CPU (17.8%) never exceeded 20% threshold over 14 days.

key_facts: bursty role
peak CPU 17.8% never exceeded 20% bursty threshold over 14 days
CV 1.84 — high variability but still fits smaller instance
DOWNSIZE to c5.large correct

A5.description: Dependent primary, tightened thresholds met, action capped at DOWNSIZE

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Dependent Primary: P95 CPU (2.1%) and peak CPU (8.4%) meet tightened thresholds. Action capped at DOWNSIZE.

key_facts: dependent_primary role — tightened thresholds apply
P95 CPU 2.1% and peak 8.4% meet tightened thresholds
action capped at DOWNSIZE (not STOP/TERMINATE for primary)
DOWNSIZE to r5.large correct

A6.description: Dependent secondary, primary peak cool — secondary-safe downsize succeeds

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Dependent Secondary: Primary P99 CPU (43.2%) allows safe downsize of secondary to r5.medium.

key_facts: dependent_secondary — secondary-safe algorithm used
primary db-primary-01 P99 CPU 43.2% — cool enough to allow downsize
safe to downsize secondary when primary is not hot
DOWNSIZE to r5.medium correct

A7.description: Dependent secondary, primary runs hot — no safe downsize, NEEDS_REVIEW

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Dependent Secondary: Primary P99 CPU (87.4%) too high — no safe fallback instance type exists.

key_facts: dependent_secondary — primary runs hot at P99 87.4%
no safe fallback instance type exists for the secondary
NEEDS_REVIEW is the right call — human must confirm before any action
blast_radius high — i-primary-hot would be affected
LLM cannot find a better solution — the blocking constraint is the primary's load
LLM should output OPTIMAL: human escalation is itself the correct outcome

A8.description: Backup instance, primary peak cool — secondary-safe downsize succeeds

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Backup: Primary P99 CPU (38.7%) allows safe downsize of backup instance to m5.medium.

key_facts: backup role — secondary-safe algorithm applies
primary app-primary-prod P99 CPU 38.7% — cool
safe to downsize backup when primary load is moderate
DOWNSIZE to m5.medium correct

A9.description: Steady idle + reads_from DynamoDB at 30% confidence — STOP with pipeline_warning

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (2.9%) and peak CPU (5.1%) below thresholds over 7 days.

key_facts: reads_from DynamoDB at 30% confidence (IAM policy inference)
pipeline_warning raised — Type A relationship
LLM must acknowledge warning in risk_notes
STOP is still correct — warning does not block action
derivation evidence: dynamodb:GetItem on payments table

A10.description: Steady idle + writes_to S3 at 30% confidence — STOP with pipeline_warning

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (3.6%) and peak CPU (6.2%) below thresholds over 7 days.

key_facts: writes_to S3 at 30% confidence (IAM policy inference)
pipeline_warning raised — Type A relationship
LLM must acknowledge warning in risk_notes
STOP is still correct — warning does not block action
derivation evidence: s3:PutObject on exports-bucket-prod

A11.description: Steady idle + failover_for EC2 at 100% (manual declaration) — NEEDS_REVIEW

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (2.7%) and peak CPU (4.9%) below thresholds — blocked by Type E relationship.

key_facts: failover_for relationship at 100% confidence (manual declaration)
Type E relationship — hard block on any action
NEEDS_REVIEW is the right call — standby instance must not be stopped
blast_radius high: app-primary-prod would lose failover coverage
redundancy_node=true — engineer must decide
LLM should output OPTIMAL: the hard block is correct and human escalation is the right outcome

A12.description: Steady idle + replicates_to EC2 at 100% (manual declaration) — NEEDS_REVIEW

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (3.1%) below thresholds — blocked by Type E relationship.

key_facts: replicates_to relationship at 100% confidence (manual declaration)
Type E relationship — hard block on any action
NEEDS_REVIEW is the right call — replication target must not be stopped
blast_radius high: data-source-prod would lose replication
redundancy_node=true — engineer must decide
LLM should output OPTIMAL: the hard block is correct and human escalation is the right outcome

A13.description: Steady idle + sends_logs_to S3 at 30% — STOP, Type D excluded, no effect on action

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (2.4%) below thresholds. Logging relationship (Type D) excluded from blast radius check.

key_facts: sends_logs_to S3 at 30% — Type D relationship
Type D (logging) is explicitly excluded from blast radius checks
no pipeline_warning raised — correct per design
STOP is correct — logging relationship has no safety implication

A14.description: Steady idle + reads_from DynamoDB (30%) + sends_logs_to EC2 (30%) — STOP + pipeline_warning, Type D excluded

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (3.4%) below thresholds. Type A (30%) triggers warning. Type D excluded.

key_facts: two relationships: reads_from DynamoDB (Type A, 30%) + sends_logs_to EC2 (Type D, 30%)
reads_from triggers pipeline_warning — Type A
sends_logs_to is Type D — excluded from blast radius, no warning
pipeline_warning_acknowledged must be true
STOP correct — only Type A triggers warning, not block

A15.description: Bursty role derived from name pattern at 30% confidence — 14 days of metrics show CV=0.06 with no burst events — LLM should override NEEDS_REVIEW and recommend DOWNSIZE as steady

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Bursty role: peak CPU (15.2%) below bursty threshold over 14 days. CV=0.06 is inconsistent with expected burst pattern. Role was derived from name pattern at 30% confidence — cannot safely act on a role mismatch without human confirmation.

llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Change instance_type from c5.2xlarge to c5.xlarge (instance behaves as steady, not bursty)
key_facts: bursty role derived from name pattern at 30% confidence — low trust
CV=0.06 over 14 days is inconsistent with burst behavior (should be >1.5)
no burst events observed — peak CPU 15.2%, P95 8.3%
Agent 2 NEEDS_REVIEW is incorrect — evidence clearly shows steady pattern
LLM should override with DOWNSIZE to c5.xlarge treating instance as steady

A16.description: Steady running instance, Agent 2 recommends STOP (idle) but DOWNSIZE is better — preserves availability while saving cost

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Idle: P95 CPU (3.8%) and peak CPU (6.9%) below thresholds over 14 days.

llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Change instance_type from m5.xlarge to t3.medium — preserves availability while reducing cost by ~73%
key_facts: instance is RUNNING — STOP would cause production downtime
P95 CPU 3.8% and P95 RAM 17.2% — massively oversized on both dimensions
t3.medium (2 vCPU, 4 GB) handles the load comfortably: projected CPU ~7.6%
DOWNSIZE saves $109.94/month while keeping the service available
Agent 2 STOP is technically valid (it is idle) but suboptimal for a production running service

A17.description: Agent 2 recommends DOWNSIZE to c5.xlarge but metrics support going directly to c5.large — one-step too conservative

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Oversized: P95 CPU (5.2%) over 30 days. Recommended c5.xlarge keeps projected CPU at 10.4%.

llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Change instance_type from c5.2xlarge to c5.large (not c5.xlarge) — projected CPU on c5.large is ~20.8%, well within safe headroom
key_facts: P95 CPU 5.2% on c5.2xlarge (8 vCPU) — absolute usage ≈ 0.416 vCPU
c5.xlarge (4 vCPU): projected 10.4% — Agent 2 stops here
c5.large (2 vCPU): projected 20.8% — still well below 50% safety threshold
P95 RAM 15.1%: c5.large (4 GB) at projected 30.2% — acceptable headroom
c5.large saves an additional ~$62/month on top of Agent 2's recommendation
Agent 2 too conservative — one-step downsize leaves significant waste on the table

A18.description: Agent 2 calls TERMINATE on an instance stopped only 4 days — premature, zombie threshold requires 30+ days

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Zombie: Instance stopped for 4 days with no network activity.

key_facts: instance stopped for only 4 days — zombie threshold is 30+ days
Agent 2 misclassified a recently stopped instance as zombie
TERMINATE on a 4-day stopped instance risks destroying active data or configs
correct action: KEEP — monitor; revisit after 30 days of inactivity
LLM must reject TERMINATE and explain the premature classification error

A19.description: Agent 2 recommends DOWNSIZE to t3.micro but P95 CPU is 76% — projected CPU would exceed 100%, making the recommendation impossible

agent2_decision.detection_reason: Steady Oversized: P95 CPU flagged over 7 days. Recommended t3.micro.

key_facts: P95 CPU 76.4%, P99 88.1%, max 94.3% — instance is under heavy load, not oversized
projected_cpu_pct = 152.8% on t3.micro — physically impossible, exceeds 100%
projected_ram_pct = 122.4% — would cause immediate OOM
Agent 2 contradicts itself: labels waste_type=oversized on a near-saturated instance
CV=1.3 confirms bursty load — further unsafe to downsize
correct action: KEEP — instance may actually need an UPSIZE

A20.description: Healthy instance — no waste detected, agent2 returns CLEAN, LLM should confirm no action needed

agent2_decision.detection_reason: No waste pattern detected. P95 CPU (58.3%) is within healthy range over 14 days.

key_facts: P95 CPU 58.3% — within healthy utilization range
P99 CPU 71.6%, max 79.4% — no oversizing signal
no waste pattern detected over 14-day window
LLM must confirm CLEAN and produce no Terraform changes
